## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated (`npm run test:ci` passes)
- [ ] Type-check passes (`npm run type-check`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Docs / Storybook stories updated where relevant
- [ ] Accessibility: no new axe violations (unit + Storybook a11y)
- [ ] Bundle size: `npm run size` still passes the budget
